name: Fine-Crumb Pie Shell-Ada
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the fine crumbs with melted margarine and water. Add spices and sugar replacement if desired.
2. Press the dough evenly into an 8-10 inch pie pan, ensuring it covers the sides and bottom.
3. Chill the mixture until set, or bake at 325°F for 8-10 minutes.
